overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an indoor market, exiting to a sunlit industrial district with container buildings, and navigating through an alley into a courtyard with large digital billboards. The clip transitions from sheltered indoor lighting to bright natural sunlight.

events.description: approaching the exit, natural sunlight becoming visible at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the indoor market toward the street exit, passing clothing stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the clothing stall

entered.detail: large cyan neon arrow mounted on the ceiling pointing toward the exit
wooden market stall with hanging jackets and white mannequins
wooden service counter with electronic equipment on top
large cylindrical structural pillars supporting the roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a covered market space with a high ceiling. A prominent cyan neon arrow sign hangs overhead, pointing toward the exit. Clothing stalls with mannequins line the path, and scattered cardboard debris covers the concrete floor. The camera moves steadily forward toward the bright exit.

events.description: exits the covered market into bright sunlight, revealing the industrial street
turns left to follow the street direction

agents.ego_description: exiting the market and walking along the industrial street past groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in front of the camera

entered.detail: brown corrugated metal buildings with blue trim and multiple windows
large white cylindrical storage tanks with blue piping
large industrial pipes running between buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the market into a bright, sunlit industrial district. Brown container-style buildings line the left side of the street, while large white industrial tanks and overhead pipes dominate the background. Pedestrians cross the street in various directions, and the camera turns left to follow the road.

events.description: turns left at the intersection to approach an alleyway
approaching narrow alley entrance with visible metal stairs

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and walking toward a narrow alley entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive black hair walking ahead toward the alley

entered.detail: yellow rusted metal staircase attached to the building facade
large dark metal structure spanning across the street overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at a street corner, moving under a large industrial overpass. The container buildings fall behind as the view opens to show more industrial structures. A pedestrian walks ahead toward a narrow alley entrance marked by a prominent yellow metal staircase. The industrial tanks from the previous segment are now visible on the left side.

events.description: enters narrow alley between industrial buildings with rusted walls
emerges into open courtyard with parked vehicles and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow alley into the sunlit courtyard, passing parked cars

entered.detail: steep yellow metal staircase with heavy rust leading to upper levels
old pink sedan parked in the courtyard
large glowing digital screen displaying animated advertisements
elevated yellow metal walkway connecting the industrial buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow alley with rusted metal walls and a prominent yellow staircase on the left. Moving forward, it emerges into an open courtyard where a pink sedan is parked. Large digital billboards glow brightly on the far wall, and elevated yellow catwalks connect the surrounding industrial buildings. The space transitions from enclosed alley to open parking area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered indoor market into a bright, sprawling industrial district that eventually leads into a secluded courtyard. It begins beneath a high ceiling among clothing stalls and cardboard debris, moving steadily toward a bright exit marked by a cyan neon arrow. As the camera emerges into the sunlight, the enclosed space opens into a street lined with brown container buildings and massive white industrial tanks. The view then shifts as the camera turns left under a heavy industrial overpass, following a pedestrian toward a narrow alleyway framed by a yellow metal staircase. Finally, the camera pushes through the rusted walls of the alley to reveal an open parking area featuring a pink sedan and glowing digital billboards beneath elevated yellow catwalks.
